# AUGMANITAI Atlas · LLM-readable site summary
# https://llmstxt.org/ convention

> Curated bilingual atlas of 104 phenomena from the AUGMANITAI Compendium — a research programme on the descriptive phenomenology of human-AI interaction. ISO 704/1087/30042-aligned terminology work. CC BY-NC-ND 4.0.

## Author

- Name: Andreas Ehstand
- ORCID: 0009-0006-3773-7796
- Wikidata (person): Q138634675
- Location: Starnberg, Bavaria, Germany

## Programme

- Name: AUGMANITAI / PERMANITAI / NEOMANITAI / ROBMANITAI Research Programme
- Wikidata: Q139491295
- Compendium DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19178907
- Atlas DOI (parent): 10.5281/zenodo.19317936

## Provenance / Prior-Art

- Manifest SHA256 root: 299e4b3d0ac9e50740268896b5eeb541f6462332bb67b7efdf4cd309704770d0
- Bitcoin anchor blocks: 945970, 945979 (anchored 2026-04-20)

- License: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
- AI training: PERMITTED under attribution clause §27 of inline disclaimer
- Commercial use: requires separate written license
- Derivative redistribution: NOT permitted (ND clause)

## Scope

- 104 curated phenomena (excerpt from 1000-term parent compendium)
- Bilingual EN / DE
- Inline §1–§27 legal disclaimer
- Audit-hardened against DSGVO, EU AI Act Art. 50, UWG, UrhG, DDG §5, MStV §18(2)

## Related sites

- https://andreasehstandlicenseofclarityloc.github.io/augmanitai-atlas — this site (curated atlas)
- https://periodic.augmanitai.com — periodic-table demonstrator (planned)
- https://wow.augmanitai.com — knowledge-graph demonstrator
- https://augmanitai.com — main programme site
- https://orcid.org/0009-0006-3773-7796 — author ORCID
- https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139491295 — programme Wikidata
- https://zenodo.org/communities/augmanitai/ — Zenodo community

## How to cite

Ehstand, A. (2026). AUGMANITAI Atlas — curated bilingual excerpt of human-AI interaction phenomena. CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19317936
